_comment: Producer-side gate config (kit-only; consumers never run this). Check 1: every spine matching spinePattern in knowledgeDirs must be cited by the catalog or carry an exemption WITH a reason. Check 2: every spine (+ alsoStatusCheck files) declares a **Status:** line starting with a controlled token — the mechanical end of mixed status vocabulary (new spines conform on arrival; sealed headers are not cosmetically rewritten).
